core_mechanism: a large-deviation rate functional for the joint steady-state fluctuations of time-averaged observables of a driven stochastic (Markov/diffusion) process, decomposed into a time-reversal-symmetric sector and a time-reversal-antisymmetric sector whose cross-coupling vanishes at the symmetric (equilibrium) point
brief_reason: The abstract analyzes dynamical steady fluctuations by splitting the joint fluctuations of occupation times and currents into time-symmetric and time-antisymmetric sectors that couple out of equilibrium and decouple close to equilibrium.
